observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 17 retained routes with standardized vision QA, a unified regression orchestrator, a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check, multi-surface proof infrastructure, a Playwright chromium health pre-flight, a docs-surface parity check, a cron slice health check, and an agent context health check. The agent context health check (shipped in this run) validates AGENTS.md, WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, and creator-mutation-candidates.json are present, parseable, and structurally sound — all local-only, no network or secrets required. Remaining gap: script health validation — ensuring every creator:* script in package.json has an existing, valid source file to catch stale entries.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, and keep docs, examples, and checks in sync without manual inspection

candidates.mutation: Add a per-surface health check (bun creator:surface-health) that runs each individual creator:*check gate for every examples/creator-*.html surface, reporting per-surface PASS/FAIL status — catching broken individual surfaces before multi-surface-proof aggregates them.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-surface-health.ts that iterates all surface HTML files, runs the corresponding creator:*check (poster-check, social-card-check, etc.), and produces a per-surface PASS/FAIL table with timing
candidates.risk: Requires all surface check scripts to be individually executable. Must handle surface HTML files without a dedicated *check script gracefully. Timing may be slow if some checks involve browser automation.

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report without bun-types false positives — improving autonomous Darwin signal-to-noise ratio.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-filter.ts that wraps the regression orchestrator, filters out known pre-existing bun-types lint errors from output, and reports only actionable failures
candidates.risk: Must not suppress real errors. Filter criteria must be precise and documented. May mask newly introduced type errors if filter is too broad.

candidates.mutation: Add a script health check (bun creator:script-health) that validates every creator:* script in package.json has a corresponding source file that exists and is valid — catching stale script entries pointing to deleted or renamed files before they cause silent failures in autonomous Darwin runs.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-script-health.ts that reads package.json scripts, filters for creator:* entries, verifies each referenced source file exists, and reports PASS/FAIL per entry
candidates.risk: Must handle scripts that invoke other scripts (e.g., 'bun run creator:foo' or 'bun scripts/foo.ts'). Must not require TypeScript compilation — source file existence is sufficient.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (18-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (repo anchor, git cleanliness, MCP connectivity, baseline gates)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts validated against measure:check + print:render in one pass)

Playwright Chromium binary health pre-flight (validates cache-dir, chromium-dir, binary, and measure:check smoke test to prevent silent 0/11 failures from binary version drift in autonomous Darwin cron runs)

Creator docs-surface parity check (10-way cross-reference of WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, mutation-candidates.json, examples/*.html, multi-surface-proof SURFACES, and package.json scripts — catches doc/ledger/filesystem drift in one pass)

Creator cron slice health check (queries GitHub for most recent merged Darwin PR, verifies CI status on merge commit, reports slice completion evidence — validates autonomous cron slice health in one pass)

Agent context health check (validates AGENTS.md, WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, and mutation-candidates.json are present, parseable, and structurally sound — all local-only, no network or secrets required)

retention: Promote creator-agent-context-route to retained_routes (shipped in this run — validates core agent-facing docs are present, parseable, and structurally sound; all local-only, 11/11 checks pass). Promote creator-surface-health-route as the new selected winner: iterates all surface HTML files, runs the corresponding creator:*check, and produces a per-surface PASS/FAIL table with timing. Add creator-script-health-route as new active candidate to validate every creator:* script entry has an existing source file.
